channel.title: programming on SOUMENDRA GANGULY
channel.description: Recent content in programming on SOUMENDRA GANGULY

item.title: A short introduction to Org-mode and Hugo
item.description: This is the first note on this website. This document was originally written in Org-mode , which is note-taking software that forms a part of the text editor GNU Emacs . HTML export of this post was done using the static site generator Hugo . Hugo is natively capable of exporting org-mode to HTML thanks to go-org . Most of this note describes the Org mode file that was used to generate the note.
